mapper.select: SELECT cr.record_id, cr.appointment_id, cr.student_id, su.real_name as student_name, cr.counselor_id, cu.real_name as counselor_name, cr.record_date, cr.session_number, cr.presenting_problem, cr.session_content, LEFT(cr.session_content, 100) as summary, cr.counselor_observations, cr.intervention_methods, cr.homework_assignment, cr.next_session_plan, cr.counselor_notes, cr.handwritten_record_url, cr.confidential_level, cr.record_status, cr.attachments, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at FROM consultation_record cr LEFT JOIN user su ON cr.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info ci ON cr.counselor_id = ci.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user cu ON ci.counselor_id = cu.user_id WHERE cr.record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT cr.record_id, cr.appointment_id, cr.student_id, su.real_name as student_name, cr.counselor_id, cu.real_name as counselor_name, cr.record_date, cr.session_number, cr.presenting_problem, cr.session_content, LEFT(cr.session_content, 100) as summary, cr.counselor_observations, cr.intervention_methods, cr.homework_assignment, cr.next_session_plan, cr.counselor_notes, cr.handwritten_record_url, cr.confidential_level, cr.record_status, cr.attachments, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at FROM consultation_record cr LEFT JOIN user su ON cr.student_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN counselor_info ci ON cr.counselor_id = ci.counselor_id LEFT JOIN user cu ON ci.counselor_id = cu.user_id WHERE cr.appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultation_record ( record_id, appointment_id, counselor_id, student_id, record_date, session_number, presenting_problem, session_content, counselor_observations, intervention_methods, homework_assignment, next_session_plan, counselor_notes, handwritten_record_url, confidential_level, record_status, attachments, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{appointmentId}, #{counselorId}, #{studentId}, #{recordDate}, COALESCE(#{sessionNumber}, 1), #{presentingProblem}, #{sessionContent}, #{counselorObservations}, #{interventionMethods}, #{homeworkAssignment}, #{nextSessionPlan}, #{counselorNotes}, #{handwrittenRecordUrl}, COALESCE(#{confidentialLevel}, 'NORMAL'), COALESCE(#{recordStatus}, 'DRAFT'), #{attachments}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE consultation_record
session_content = #{sessionContent},
counselor_observations = #{counselorObservations},
intervention_methods = #{interventionMethods},
homework_assignment = #{homeworkAssignment},
next_session_plan = #{nextSessionPlan},
counselor_notes = #{counselorNotes},
presenting_problem = #{presentingProblem},
confidential_level = #{confidentialLevel},
record_status = #{recordStatus},
attachments = #{attachments},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = #{recordId}

UPDATE consultation_record
session_content = #{sessionContent},
counselor_observations = #{counselorObservations},
intervention_methods = #{interventionMethods},
homework_assignment = #{homeworkAssignment},
next_session_plan = #{nextSessionPlan},
counselor_notes = #{counselorNotes},
presenting_problem = #{presentingProblem},
confidential_level = #{confidentialLevel},
attachments = #{attachments},
record_status = 'DRAFT', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
